name: Habersham cleaned parcel faces - local feet

metadata.cleanup_method: Faces below 400 sq ft were grouped by shared boundaries and merged into the adjacent larger face with the greatest shared boundary; near-ties used compactness improvement.
metadata.cleanup_tolerance_description: Area-based remnant removal selected at the natural 400-to-1719 sq ft gap; no parcel-scale vertex simplification was applied.
metadata.georeference_source: Prior geolocated SketchUp/KMZ model origin and heading
metadata.warning: Diagnostic local-coordinate companion. RFC 7946 GeoJSON consumers should use the WGS84 file.
metadata.cleanup_review_note: Components flagged REVIEW_NEAR_TIE have two adjacent faces sharing at least 70% as much boundary as the selected target; inspect the cleanup audit if legal parcel assignment matters.
